Peshawar.note: Capital of the North-West Frontier Province

Tehkal.note: Neighbourhood on the eastern edge of Peshawar, frequently mentioned in intelligence reports.

Regi.note: Area south of Peshawar near the Kohat road, part of the Regi Lalma plateau.

Utmanzai.note: Village in Charsadda district, birthplace of Khan Abdul Ghaffar Khan and headquarters of the Khudai Khidmatgar movement.

Nowshera.note: Garrison town on the Grand Trunk Road

Mahzara.note: Village in the Charsadda/Peshawar area associated with Red Shirt activity.

Kabuli Gate.note: Gate in the Peshawar city wall

Turangzai.note: Village near Charsadda, home of the Mullah of Turangzai (Fazlul Wahid), a prominent frontier resistance figure.

Qissa.note: Bazaar of the Storytellers in Peshawar

Kochian.note: Village in the Peshawar valley, frequently referenced in Red Shirt movement reports.

Landi.note: Highest point of the Khyber Pass

Lahori Gate.note: Gate in the Peshawar city wall

unmatched: P E S H A W A R
